design_philosophy: Earthy, minimalist, 'Surprisingly Delightful'. An organic modern e-commerce experience blending raw natural textures with sleek minimalist structures. Avoid glossy surfaces. Use matte finishes, generous negative space, and a color palette rooted in raw jute, terracotta, and deep forest green.

typography.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-medium
typography.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl md:text-5xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-medium

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky/fixed header using backdrop-blur-xl and bg-[#FAF8F5]/80. Ensure high contrast text. Include GOTHRA logo (text-based Serif), key links, and cart icon. data-testid='nav-header'.
components_strategy.hero: Full height or min-h-[85vh]. Layout: Asymmetric. Left side: Large typography 'Inducing an Organic Lifestyle through Indigenous Craft'. Right side: Hero image with slight parallax. Background: #FAF8F5.
components_strategy.product_cards: Minimalist rectangular. Image takes up 80% of height. On hover: Image scales slightly (1.05), and an overlay reveals the 'Price' and 'Add to Cart' button. data-testid='product-card'.
components_strategy.categories_grid: Bento-style Grid (Mode A: Tetris). Mix of tall, wide, and square image blocks for Home Decor, Beauty & Wellness, Herbs & Spices, Kitchen Essentials.
components_strategy.about_section: Editorial layout. Large portrait image of a woman artisan intersecting with a text block describing the entrepreneurial arm for proletarian women. Use terracotta accent.
components_strategy.coming_soon_teaser: Darker, moody section (Deep Forest Green #1E3F33 background). Misty tea garden image with opacity. Text: 'Coming Soon - Seven Sisters Collection'. Use subtle reveal animation.
components_strategy.footer: Generous spacing (py-24). Deep Forest Green background, Bone White text. Contact info (Trivandrum), elegant newsletter input.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Product cards: reveal pricing/CTA on hover. Images: scale-105 duration-700 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-up for typography and grid items using framer-motion.

hero_background.description: Close up of highly textured woven baskets. Use as a large hero visual or subtle background texture.

category_home_decor.description: Potted plants. Represents wooden planters and jute home decor.

category_beauty_wellness.description: Ceramic bowls/skincare context. Represents organic skincare, coconut oil, face packs.

category_herbs_spices.description: Cup of tea with spices and cinnamon. Represents blue tea, hibiscus, cardamom.

category_kitchen_essentials.description: Jars on rustic background. Represents gourmet pickles.

about_us_artisan.description: Elderly woman grinding spices. Represents proletarian women entrepreneurs.

teaser_seven_sisters.description: Misty tea plantation. Represents North-East India collection teaser.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'Cormorant Garamond' and 'Manrope' fonts are properly loaded and applied globally via Tailwind in the frontend project.
Implement a clean, grid-based shopping cart and Stripe checkout integration. Do not clutter the checkout.
Product cards MUST have a smooth hover interaction: hide price initially or show an overlay, and on hover, smoothly display the price and an 'Add to Cart' button.
Navigation must be sticky with a backdrop-blur.
Add 'data-testid' to all buttons, navigation links, and product cards.
Footer must display 'Trivandrum' as the store address clearly.
Use only the provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
